nasb.text: therefore you will no longer devour men and no longer bereave your nation of children,’ declares the Lord God.

esv.text: therefore you shall no longer devour people and no longer bereave your nation of children, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 所以你必不再吞吃人，也必不再使你的國民喪失子女。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 但你们今后必不再吞吃以色列人，不再夺走他们的儿女。这是主耶和华说的。
